title: Celebi India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Celebi India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Celebi India are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Celebi India:
Celebi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Celebi India!
